# @codenhub/error

> Typed error normalization, result helpers, and opt-in browser and Supabase
> registry presets. The package is experimental, and its default registry is
> empty.

Register application mappings explicitly. Deterministic registry matches become
known errors, regex matches become unexpected errors, and unmatched values use
the configured fallback message.

## Documentation

- [Documentation overview](docs/index.md): Scope, stability, entrypoints, and
  navigation.
- [Error normalization and registries](docs/error-normalization.md): AppError,
  matching, registry APIs, presets, defaults, and failures.
- [Result helpers](docs/results.md): Result types, combinators, and throwing
  behavior.
